scenario.title: Per-instance settings reached from the instance selector
steps: Open the app with at least one instance configured
Open the chat header instance selector dropdown
Click the gear icon on an instance row
Verify the InstanceSettingsPanel drawer opens with Reach, Runtime, Credentials, and Remove sections
Edit the instance name and verify it persists
Add a new endpoint and verify it appears
Switch the active endpoint and verify reconnect
Clear credentials and verify auth state changes
Click Remove instance, confirm, and verify the instance is removed

assertions.description: Gear icon is visible on each instance row in the InstanceSelector dropdown
Clicking the gear icon opens the InstanceSettingsPanel drawer
The panel displays Reach, Runtime, Credentials, and Remove sections
Editing the instance name updates the environment
Switching agent runtime updates the environment
Switching active endpoint triggers connection retry
Re-pairing with a code updates auth state
Clearing credentials changes authState to unauthenticated
Removing instance with confirmation removes the environment

prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence

Evidence capture was **blocked** — browser automation is unavailable in this environment. Manual verification required:

1. Gear icon on instance rows in the InstanceSelector
2. InstanceSettingsPanel drawer with Reach, Runtime, Credentials, Remove sections
3. Edit instance name, switch runtime, add/remove endpoints
4. Re-pair, clear credentials, remove instance with confirmation
